heading: Try the Examples in the MongoDB Search Playground
body:
You can try the following MongoDB Search features in a preconfigured
environment in the [MongoDB Search Playground](https://search-playground.mongodb.com/tools/code-sandbox/snapshots/new).

| MongoDB Search Feature | Description                                                                                                                             | Examples                                                                                      |
| ---------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| compound Operator      | Combines two or more operators into a single query.                                                                                     | must and mustNotmust and shouldCompound ScoreminimumShouldMatchfilter$match ReplacementNested |
| exists Operator        | Tests if a path to a specified indexed field name exists in a document.                                                                 | BasicEmbedded fieldCompound                                                                   |
| highlight Option       | Adds fields to the result set that display search terms as they appear in the returned documents, along with any adjacent text content. | BasicAdvancedMulti-FieldWildcardCompoundAutocomplete                                          |
